title: Compiler-Derived Execution Conditioning Experiment
model: Gemma 4 12B (8-bit quantized, safetensors compiled to ComputeImage)
reason_not_complete: Arm B conditioning runs in separate processes that exit before inference. Process-local MLX/Metal pipeline state is destroyed. The 16.4% decode improvement cannot be attributed to pipeline conditioning within the inference runtime.
Plausible alternative explanations: OS file page cache, mapped-page residency, shared Metal driver state, thermal/frequency effects, or scheduling artifacts.
Arm C used cat segment_*.bin (12.2GB full-model sweep), not the bounded one-layer prefetch coordinator. Mission spec prohibits full-model prefetch.
Arm C (4 runs), Arm D (2 runs), Arm E (4 runs) all below required 7 valid trials.
Arm E sham median (43.7s) is 4.4% *faster* than control (45.7s), not 7% overhead. Signal within noise of Arm A.
No statistical comparison: no confidence interval, no bootstrap, no paired treatment-minus-control. Arm B range (25.1-46.2s) overlaps control range (43.3-56.2s).
TRIBUNUS_SKIP_MANIFEST_HASH=1 disabled manifest integrity verification on all claim-grade runs.
Backend equivalence not demonstrated. Isolated M=1 replay runs on CPU; integrated decode uses GPU. Mandatory promotion gate.
valid_observation: Cross-process preconditioning: running 3 real projection replays before decode is associated with 16.4% lower median decode time in 7-arm sample. The 152s startup cost and ~20 request break-even describe the observed sequence. Mechanism unknown.
required_corrections: Replace Arm B with same-process conditioning: open model runtime, execute scratch full-layer recipe, retain runtime, run decode without exiting process.
Replace Arm C with bounded one-layer prefetch coordinator, not cat-over-full-image.
Collect >=7 valid interleaved runs for all five arms.
Demonstrate backend equivalence via Metal System Trace.
Compute paired statistical comparison with confidence interval.

B_cross_process_preconditioning.note: NOT pipeline conditioning. Separate replay-projection processes exit before decode. Effect is cross-process.

C_full_model_fadvise.note: NOT bounded rolling prefetch. 12.2GB full-model cat sweep. Mission spec violation.

E_sham.note: 4.4% FASTER than control. Within noise, not instrumentation overhead.

next_safe_action: Keep Mission 0007 active. Implement same-process conditioning (scratch full-layer graph within model runtime). Wire bounded one-layer prefetch coordinator. Re-run all five arms with >=7 valid interleaved trials, manifest verification enabled, and paired statistical analysis.
